summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KingdomCraft Admin Panel. All backend APIs working perfectly (11/11 passed). Frontend authentication resolved - admin panel fully accessible with all features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height warning in console - charts display but show console warnings about negative dimensions
ui_bugs.impact: Visual warning in console, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Admin authentication - login works correctly
Admin dashboard (/admin) displays with statistics and charts
Statistics cards show: Users (5), Pages (3), Views (33), Status
Page views chart (last 7 days) renders correctly with Recharts
Popular pages section displays page paths with view counts
Quick actions: Manage pages, Users, SEO Settings, Page preview all clickable
Recently registered users table displays correctly
Maintenance mode toggle works (tested on/off functionality)
Users management page (/admin/users) fully functional
Users search functionality works
Add user button present and functional
Users table displays 3 users with proper role badges
SEO page (/admin/seo) displays all required sections
Sitemap.xml section with working URL
Robots.txt section with working URL
SEO tips section with 4 optimization hints
Pages status table shows 3 pages with languages
Google Search Console instructions provided
Page view tracking (POST /api/analytics/pageview) works
Analytics summary API returns all required fields
SEO endpoints: /api/seo/sitemap.xml returns valid XML
SEO endpoints: /api/seo/robots.txt returns valid robots.txt
Admin settings update API works (maintenance mode toggle)
All admin routes properly protected and accessible to admin users
